name: Forty Days in the Wilderness
oracleText:
Chapter I - You gain 2 life and scry 2.
Chapter II - Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
Chapter III - Creatures you control gain hexproof until your next turn.
flavorText: "When he had fasted forty days and forty nights, he was afterward an hungred." — Matthew 4:2
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide.
